package rulecoverage

func PositiveGinHandlerReturnsPersistenceModelDirectly() string {
    ruleID := "gin_handler_returns_persistence_model_directly"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Handlers that serialize database models directly to the client instead of mapping to response DTOs."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
